name: trigger_deploy
description: Trigger a new deploy for a Render service. Optionally clear the build cache to force a clean rebuild. The deploy will build and go live asynchronously. Use list_deploys to monitor the deploy status.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The service ID to trigger a deploy for.

parameters.name: clearCache
parameters.description: Set to 'clear' to clear the build cache before building. Omit or set to 'do_not_clear' to keep the cache.
